hub.subtitle.en: Functional Behavior Assessment, ABC data collection, and Behavior Intervention Plan tools.
hub.subtitle.tr: Jami me Functional Behavior Assessment, coc me data me ABC, ki yub me Behavior Intervention Plan.

hub.abc_desc.en: Record antecedent, behavior, and consequence observations
hub.abc_desc.tr: Coo gin ma okwongo (antecedent), kit me tim (behavior), ki gin ma olubo (consequence)

hub.interval_desc.en: Partial, whole, or momentary time sampling grid
hub.interval_desc.tr: Cawa me kwac (partial), me ducu (whole), onyo me kombedi (momentary)

hub.gas_desc.en: Goal Attainment Scaling with AI-generated descriptors
hub.gas_desc.tr: Goal Attainment Scaling ki coc ma AI ocoyo

hub.bcbahandoff_desc.en: Data dashboard for BCBAs + printable handoff packet for consultation
hub.bcbahandoff_desc.tr: Dashboard me data pi BCBA ki packet me coyo me yor pi consultation

hub.drstrategy_desc.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.drstrategy_desc.tr: Yer differential reinforcement ma ber (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)

hub.dtt_desc.en: Discrete Trial Training — trial-by-trial recording with mastery criteria and auto-advance
hub.dtt_desc.tr: Discrete Trial Training — coc me trial acel acel ki cik me loyo ki cako auto

hub.fcttemplate_desc.en: Functional Communication Training planning with modality selection
hub.fcttemplate_desc.tr: Yub me Functional Communication Training ki yer me modality

hub.ioacalc_desc.en: Inter-Observer Agreement with 6 methods — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.ioacalc_desc.tr: Inter-Observer Agreement ki yo 6 — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count

hub.latency_desc.en: Stimulus-to-response time measurement with mean, median, and range statistics
hub.latency_desc.tr: Pim cawa ki cing kun stimulus pa cing me dwoko ki mean, median, ki range

hub.prefassess_desc.en: Systematic reinforcer identification — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, and Free Operant protocols
hub.prefassess_desc.tr: Nong reinforcer ki yo — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, ki Free Operant

hub.snapshot_title.tr: Exchange me Snapshot pa Latin Kwan

hub.socialvalidity_desc.en: TARF and IRP-15 scales for measuring treatment acceptability — required for publication
hub.socialvalidity_desc.tr: Scales me TARF ki IRP-15 me pim me yer pa kony — mite pi publication

hub.bipgen_desc.en: Draft a Behavior Intervention Plan from your data.
hub.bipgen_desc.tr: Coo Behavior Intervention Plan ki data ni.

hub.cantdowontdo_desc.en: Sort skill vs. performance deficits to pick the right support.
hub.cantdowontdo_desc.tr: Pok skill vs. performance deficits wek iyer kony ma ber.

quiz_replacement.tr: Kit kwo me leyo (replacement behavior) obedo ngo?

fidelity_tip_2.tr: Mi pwony mukene me BST (Behavioral Skills Training)

ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.en: Add a team note... (Shift+Enter for new line)
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li.tr: Med kor lok pa team... (Shift+Enter pi pol manyen)

toast.case_study_generated_begin_phase_1.tr: Ki cweyo case study! Cak Phase 1.

toast.data_loaded_from_cloud.tr: ☁️ Ki kelo data ki i cloud

toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_.en: Failed to generate case study. Try again.
toast.failed_to_generate_case_study_try_.tr: Pe otwero cweyo case study. Tem doki.

toast.failed_to_parse_snapshot_file.tr: Pe otwero niang file me snapshot

toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep.en: Graph data attached to IEP Prep!
toast.graph_data_attached_to_iep_prep.tr: Data me graph ki keto i IEP Prep!

toast.iep_prep_packet_generated.tr: Ki cweyo packet me IEP prep ✨

toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.en: Need at least 2 data points per phase
toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph.tr: Mito data 2 nicelo i phase acel acel

toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap.en: Need at least 2 phases in the Graph (baseline + intervention)
toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap.tr: Mito phase 2 nicelo i Graph (baseline + intervention)

toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file.en: Not a valid AlloFlow snapshot file
toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file.tr: Man pe file me AlloFlow snapshot ma kakare

toast.not_a_valid_consent_template_file.en: Not a valid consent template file
toast.not_a_valid_consent_template_file.tr: Man pe file me template me yee ma kakare

toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_.en: Pop-ups blocked — downloaded as HTML file instead.
toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_.tr: Ki gengo pop-up — ki kelo piny macalo file me HTML.

toast.share_code_copied_to_clipboard.tr: Code me nyutu okopi i clipboard!

toast.autofilled_from_phase_tagged_entri.tr: Opongo pi ngene ki i entries ma kiketo phase tags.

toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.en: Need at least 2 baseline and 2 intervention entries with phase tags.
toast.need_2_baseline_2_intervention_ent.tr: Mito 2 baseline ki 2 intervention entries ma kibedo ki phase tags.

toast.snapshot_rejected_entries.en: Skipped ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} malformed entries (missing/invalid timestamp or wrong field types). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} valid entries kept for review.
toast.snapshot_rejected_entries.tr: Okwango ${rejectedAbc + rejectedObs} entries ma pe tye atir (timestamp aye pe nyo kit pa field me kupore). ${validAbc.length + validObs.length} entries ma atir gugwoki pi ngiyo.

toast.share_code_too_large.en: Snapshot too large for share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, limit 5,000). Use 💾 Download Snapshot instead.
toast.share_code_too_large.tr: Snapshot dwong adwong pi share code (${encoded.length.toLocaleString()} chars, kom 5,000). Tic ki 💾 Cwal Snapshot kakare.

ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r.en: Add ABC entries before generating a report.
ui.add_abc_entries_before_generating_a_r.tr: Med ABC entries ma peya iyubo report.

ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d.en: Add ABC entries to see visual trend data.
ui.add_abc_entries_to_see_visual_trend_d.tr: Med ABC entries me neno data me anenne pa trend.

ui.add_data_points_above_or_paste_csv_da.en: Add data points above or paste CSV data to get started.
ui.add_data_points_above_or_paste_csv_da.tr: Med data points malo nyo cik CSV data me cako.

ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.en: Choose the right differential reinforcement strategy
ui.choose_the_right_differential_reinfor.tr: Yer yore me differential reinforcement ma atir

ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.en: Click "Load Student Workspaces" and select multiple .json files saved from BehaviorLens
ui.click_load_student_workspaces_and_sel.tr: Dii "Load Student Workspaces" ki yer .json files mapol ma kigwoko ki i BehaviorLens

ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio.en: Create your first replacement behavior plan.
ui.create_your_first_replacement_behavio.tr: Yub plan ni mukwongo me replacement behavior.

ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_.en: Discrete Trial Training with mastery tracking and auto-advance
ui.discrete_trial_training_with_mastery_.tr: Discrete Trial Training ki ngene pa mastery ki auto-advance

ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.en: Enter data or record sessions to generate a cumulative record.
ui.enter_data_or_record_sessions_to_gene.tr: Ket data nyo gwok tic me cawa me yubo cumulative record.

ui.functional_communication_training_pla.tr: Gin tic me yiko pa Functional Communication Training

ui.no_entries_yet_tap_log_a_behavior_to_.en: No entries yet. Tap "Log a Behavior" to get started!
ui.no_entries_yet_tap_log_a_behavior_to_.tr: Entries pe tye pud. Dii "Log a Behavior" me cako!

ui.publicationstandard_singlecase_design.tr: Single-case design graphs ma rom me coc i waraga

ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data.en: Record sessions with the Session Data Tracker, or switch to Manual Entry mode.
ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data.tr: Gwok tic me cawa ki Session Data Tracker, nyo lok i mode me Manual Entry.

ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure.en: Select a research design to structure your data collection
ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure.tr: Yer research design me yubo kit pa coko data ni

ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member.en: Share workspace data with team members. Role-based views filter data appropriately for BCBAs, teachers, and parents.
ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member.tr: Nyut workspace data ki jo me team. Anenne ma olubu role yenyo data ma rom pi BCBAs, lupwony, ki lunyodo.

raw.artificial_intelligence_ai_usage_dis.tr: Lok me Tic ki Artificial Intelligence (AI)

raw.compare_current_data_to_baseline_lev.en: Compare current data to baseline levels
raw.compare_current_data_to_baseline_lev.tr: Por data me ki kombedi ki dit me baseline

raw.conduct_a_full_functional_behavior_a.en: Conduct a full Functional Behavior Assessment
raw.conduct_a_full_functional_behavior_a.tr: Tim Functional Behavior Assessment ma otye dong

raw.review_progress_monitoring_data_vs_b.en: Review progress monitoring data vs. baseline
raw.review_progress_monitoring_data_vs_b.tr: Ngi data me ngiyo dongo vs. baseline

sandbox.add_phase_desc.en: Add a new phase with custom data points.
sandbox.add_phase_desc.tr: Med phase manyen ki coc me data mamegi.
